data.title: RED: Write failing tests for CLI guide creation and MCP guide removal
data.description:
## Description
Create tests/skills/test-playwright-cli-guide.sh asserting: (a) PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md no longer exists, (b) a CLI-focused guide exists, (c) the CLI guide documents all required sections (commands, output patterns, session naming, pre-flight, CI considerations).

Test functions:
- test_mcp_guide_removed: asserts PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md does not exist
- test_cli_guide_exists: asserts CLI guide file exists at expected path
- test_cli_guide_sections: asserts guide contains required sections (commands, output patterns, session naming, pre-flight, CI)
- test_cross_references_updated: asserts skills reference CLI guide, not MCP guide

All tests fail because MCP guide still exists and CLI guide does not.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-playwright-cli-guide.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-playwright-cli-guide.sh
- [ ] Contains at least 4 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/skills/test-playwright-cli-guide.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] All tests fail (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-playwright-cli-guide.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
